summary: Bryan Cantrill reminds readers about a DTrace challenge competition with only 17 days remaining. He encourages participation as a way to demonstrate DTrace skills and win prizes. As the creator of DTrace, he notes he's ineligible to compete but promises to share what his entry would have been after the contest concludes.
key_points: DTrace challenge competition has 17 days remaining
Cantrill is ineligible as DTrace creator
He will share his hypothetical entry post-contest
money_quotes: This is a great opportunity to both show your DTrace prowess and win some propellor-head bling bling in the process.
key_insight: A brief promotional post encouraging the DTrace community to participate in a skills competition, reflecting the early community-building efforts around the technology.
